name: ExtensionGraphDefinition_Node
title: R5: Potential target for the link (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `GraphDefinition.node` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`GraphDefinition.node` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `GraphDefinition.node` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `GraphDefinition.node` has a context of GraphDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `GraphDefinition`.
Element `GraphDefinition.node` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
